recommendations:
Nick David

I had the pleasure of working with Mungo during my time at Posterscope. Mungo has a wealth of knowledge when it comes to outdoor and OOH. He is a fantastic mentor and kept me on the 'straight and narrow.' Thank you for all your help back then.

Mark Dillon

I worked with Mungo for circa three years and found him to be one of the best Manager's I have worked for. He has great vision and knows how to get the best from people.
